name: Robert De Niro
abstract: Robert Anthony De Niro ( də NEER-roh; Italian: [de ˈniːro]; born August 17, 1943) is an American actor, director, film producer, and restaurateur. Widely regarded as one of the greatest and most influential actors of his generation, he has received various accolades, including two Academy Awards and a Golden Globe Award as well as nomina…

concerts.label: CityKids Speak at Carnegie Hall... Voices from the Front Line

about_quotes.speaker: Josiah Gluck
about_quotes.evidence: I will say that I was working on a film score, “Good Shepherd” which was a film that Robert DeNiro directed... I had offered a suggestion to Mr. DeNiro... And it worked.
about_quotes.doc_title: Josiah Gluck interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, July 13, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Chick Corea
about_quotes.evidence: The way you put it at the time was that you liked Dustin Hoffman vis-a-vis Robert DeNiro.
about_quotes.doc_title: Chick Corea — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
